emails.subject: Re: Nov. 13 UC summit conference on electricity
emails.subject_base: Nov. 13 UC summit conference on electricity
emails.body: I've got a few too many speeches coming up. You are probably in the best position to address this crowd (time for the student to teach the teacher), but I'd understand if you think it would be awkward (the we should just decline). Jeff Dasovich 10/05/2000 01:23 PM
